user_query: Read the most recently modified OneDrive file and check if any company names in it are Salesforce accounts.

plan.query: Read the most recently modified OneDrive file and check if any company names in it are Salesforce accounts.
plan.reasoning: The query involves two distinct tasks: retrieving the most recently modified OneDrive file and then checking its contents against Salesforce accounts. These tasks can be performed by the available agents in two steps.

steps.task: Retrieve the most recently modified OneDrive file.
Check if any company names from the retrieved OneDrive file are present as accounts in Salesforce.

plan.synthesis: Combine the result of the Salesforce account check to report which company names from the OneDrive file are valid accounts.
